rationale: Ground truth offers nothing substantive (just an 'lgtm' approve, no inline comments), and both candidates correctly reach APPROVE with well-grounded, diff-consistent explanations of the rename and its upstream motivation, with no apparent fabrication. X edges ahead by adding a genuine forward-looking observation (tests mock the attribute directly, so they won't catch a future upstream rename) that Y lacks, while Y's per-hunk validation table is precise but purely confirmatory. Neither has a LATENT GAP CHECK section.
